primary_accounting_issue: Déterminer, en comptes consolidés, quels modèles de comptabilité de couverture IFRS peuvent être envisagés pour le risque de change lié à des dividendes intragroupe, en tenant compte des règles d’éligibilité des éléments intragroupe comme éléments couverts.

authority_resolution.selection_reason: I applied the required strict precedence rule that IFRS supersedes IAS for overlapping hedge-accounting eligibility, hedged-item and hedge-model questions, so IFRS 9 governs and IAS 39 is discarded.
authority_resolution.residual_uncertainty: low — the issue is a hedge-accounting eligibility and model-identification question directly addressed by IFRS 9, while IAS 39 is legacy overlapping guidance.

primary_authority.reason: These paragraphs directly govern eligible hedged items in consolidation, the intragroup foreign-currency exceptions, hedge qualification and the named hedge accounting models.

supporting_authority.reason: These paragraphs explain when foreign exchange differences on monetary items remain relevant in consolidated financial statements and how IAS 21 interacts with hedge accounting.
This Interpretation clarifies the distinct net investment hedge model and how foreign currency hedge accounting operates within a group.

peripheral_authority.reason: These paragraphs deal with hedge accounting disclosures, not the identification of the governing hedge accounting approaches.

treatment_families.family: Hedge accounting relationship types available for foreign currency risk in consolidated financial statements

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value hedge as a named hedge accounting model for recognised assets or liabilities exposed to a particular risk that could affect profit or loss.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies cash flow hedge as a named hedge accounting model for variability in cash flows attributable to a particular risk, including forecast transactions.

approaches.label: Hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation as a separate named hedge accounting model for foreign currency exposure within a group.
